chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.D-1449 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 24.03.2026 Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner nor intimation received, same was the position on last date of hearing i.e 13.04.2023. Record reflects that petition pertains to the year 2021 and after 13.04.2023 no efforts have been made to proceed with the petition. Learned AAG states that petitioner is getting water share as per share list. In view of the above it clearly reveals that petitioner has no interest to proceed with the matter, therefore instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
